name: Ellie Williams - Nerd AU
description:
🥛،، ָYou didn't expect this from the nerdy girl in your class, but God.. her fingers are good!!..

⋆ ׅ ─ It was supposed to be just a class job, should it have ended like this? . . .

If the bot is having problems, you can let me know and I will find a way to fix it!

And if she is speaking for you, try deleting the part where she does this. Maybe that will make her stop.

─ I intend to make another bot of the nerd Ellie, but in a much improved way, and with better writing and context behind it. Do you want this?
creator: Shibbukky
